things.name: Rumba Music at L'Atmosphère
things.description: Kinshasa is the home of Congo rumba - UNESCO Intangible Heritage performed nightly

things.name: Congo River Ferry to Brazzaville
things.description: Cross the world's deepest river between Africa's two closest capitals

things.name: National Museum of Congo
things.description: Kuba Kingdom masks, Luba ceremonial objects and Congolese natural history

things.name: Marche de la Liberte
things.description: Kinshasa's main market with authentic Congolese wax prints, wood carvings and masks

things.name: Virunga National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Africa's oldest park - gorilla trekking and active volcano Nyiragongo

things.name: Académie des Beaux-Arts de Kinshasa
things.description: Africa's leading art school with extraordinary contemporary Congolese painting

things.name: Lola ya Bonobo Sanctuary
things.description: World's only bonobo sanctuary - meet the closest relative to human DNA

things.name: Boulevard du 30 Juin
things.description: Kinshasa's grand colonial-era boulevard with the 1960 independence monument

things.name: Cité de l'Union Africaine Quarter
things.description: Where Africa's movers and shakers meet - restaurants and bars of high Kinshasa

things.name: Pondu ya Madesu (Cassava Leaves & Beans)
things.description: Congolese staple - cassava leaves pounded with palm oil and black-eyed beans
